judgments.reasoning: No candidate addresses adding try-catch around a dynamic import; all candidates cover forEach(async) or CalendarManager type issues.
C1 identifies the same forEach(async) antipattern detaching calendar/video deletions in vital/reschedule.ts that golden 2 describes.
No candidate addresses the function/file naming inconsistency between TwoFactor and BackupCode.tsx.
No candidate addresses the wrong error message text mentioning 'backup code login' on the disable endpoint.
C1 identifies the same case-sensitive indexOf comparison without toLowerCase for backup codes in the login authorize path.
C3 identifies the same TOCTOU race where concurrent requests with the same backup code both pass the indexOf check before either persists null.

C2 identifies the same fire-and-forget forEach pattern for deleteScheduledEmailReminder/deleteScheduledSMSReminder in handleCancelBooking.ts and related files.
C1 identifies the same immediateDelete=true path that deletes the SendGrid job but leaves the WorkflowReminder DB row orphaned.
C1 identifies the same end-boundary bug where slotStartTime is used for both start and end instead of slotEndTime.
C2 identifies the same === reference comparison on Dayjs objects in the zero-length override check in slots.ts.
C1 identifies the same hardcoded literal string 'refresh_token' assigned as the token value in parseRefreshTokenResponse.
No candidate addresses the invalid Zod computed property key syntax [z.string().toString()].
C2 identifies the same issue where parseRefreshTokenResponse returns a SafeParseReturnType wrapper that gets stored in the DB instead of the parsed data.
C4 identifies the same type mismatch where refreshOAuthTokens in sync mode returns a raw fetch Response but Hubspot (and other callers) expect the integration-specific token object.
C3 identifies the same issue where the sync path returns a raw fetch Response so res?.data is undefined and accessing token fields throws at runtime.
No candidate identifies the stale read race condition on retryCount (retryCount+1 without atomic increment); C2 addresses a different scenario in the catch block.
C1 identifies the same OR clause in deleteMany that deletes non-SMS reminders with retryCount > 1 due to missing method:SMS filter.
C2 identifies the same case-sensitive email blacklist comparison where the blacklist is lowercased but guest emails are not normalized before includes().
C1 identifies the same isTeamAdmin && isTeamOwner AND logic error that should use OR.
C3 identifies the same sendAddGuestsEmails being called with the original guests array instead of uniqueGuests.
No candidate addresses the missing deduplication of duplicate emails within the input to uniqueGuests.
No candidate addresses the initial empty string in the guests array causing validation issues.
No candidate addresses the updateManyByCredentialId empty data object preventing @updatedAt from updating; C2 is about TRPCError vs plain Error.
C1 identifies the same macOS-specific sed -i '' syntax that fails on GNU/Linux.
C1 identifies the same duplicate self.downsize definition where the second overrides the first in optimized_image.rb.
C2 identifies the same hardcoded 10 MB client-side preflight that ignores SiteSettings max_*_size_kb.
No candidate addresses the gifsicle --resize-fit WxH geometry failure when 80% percentage is passed for animated GIFs.
C1 identifies the same nil dereference crash when no TopicUser record exists for the current user.
No candidate addresses the typo 'stopNotificiationsText' missing 'n' in Notifications.
No candidate addresses should_block_email? updating statistics as a side effect during a read operation.
C2 identifies the same regex pattern that matches domain suffixes rather than full domains, enabling whitelist bypass.
C6 identifies the same SSRF vulnerability from using open-uri's open() with an unvalidated URL in poll_feed and topic_embed.
C1 identifies the same insufficient indexOf origin check in embed.js that allows spoofed origins.
No candidate addresses the postMessage targetOrigin being the full referrer URL instead of just the origin (scheme+host+port).
No candidate addresses X-Frame-Options ALLOWALL disabling clickjacking protection with bypassable referer validation.
No candidate addresses the NoMethodError when contents is nil or the XSS from unescaped url interpolation in TopicEmbed.import.
C2 identifies the same invalid 'end if' ERB tag in best.html.erb that causes SyntaxError on every render.
No candidate addresses mixing float:left with flexbox or the non-Ember header panel alignment issue.
C1 identifies the same fabricated -ms-align-items property that never existed in IE/Edge.
No candidate identifies the missing ? suffix on include_website_name required by Rails serializer convention.
C1 identifies the same lightness inversion in desktop/topic-post.scss where 30% was changed to 70% for the light theme.
C4 identifies the same desktop/user.scss .name color change from 30% to 50% for the light theme.
No candidate identifies topic-post.css specifically changing from 70% to 30% for the light theme; C2 covers mobile/modal.scss with that direction but a different file.
C3 identifies the same fire-and-forget findMembers() call in setupController without awaiting, causing empty member data on first render.
C4 identifies the same next action clamping offset to user_count which produces an empty last page.
No candidate addresses the HTTP method mismatch where the test uses PUT but remove_member expects DELETE.

C1 identifies the same incomplete double-checked locking pattern where the cache is not rechecked after write-lock acquisition.
No candidate addresses the unconditional cache assignment of the fetch result even when the fetch failed and result is nil.
C1 identifies the same enableSqlExpressions logic that always returns false regardless of feature flag state.
C2 identifies the same RunCommands returning 'not implemented' (and C3 covers QueryFramesInto, but G2 mentions both; C2 is the best single match).
C1 identifies the same race condition in BuildIndex where the mutex was moved from protecting the whole function to only the cache write, allowing duplicate concurrent builds.
No candidate addresses TotalDocs() racing with concurrent index creation via the event watcher goroutine.
C1 identifies the same arity mismatch where UsernameForm calls isConditionalPasskeysEnabled() with no arguments but the method requires a UserModel parameter.
No candidate addresses the impact on initial login page where context.getUser() is null and conditional passkey UI won't be set up.
No candidate addresses the recursive caching call using session instead of delegate in the Infinispan IDP storage provider.

C2 identifies the same null return from getSubGroupsCount() that violates the contract and causes NPE via auto-unboxing at callers.
C1 identifies the same reader thread not being joined before the assertion, creating a race where exceptions added after the flag change are missed.
C1 identifies the same Django QuerySet negative indexing AssertionError in OptimizedCursorPaginator when enable_advanced_features is true and cursor.offset < 0.
